deck.author: OpenAI Codex
deck.subject: Demonstration presentation
deck.title: Intro to Aalto University
deck.outline:
1. Welcome to Aalto University: An Introduction - Aalto University is a leading institution in Finland focused on educating future thought-leaders through interdisciplinary collaboration.
2. Structure and Schools: A Hub for Innovation - Aalto University operates through six schools covering Arts, Engineering, Business, Chemical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Science, fostering creative sustainability and innovation.
3. Key Takeaways: Opportunities at Aalto - Aalto University offers diverse opportunities for learning, research, and events that cater to a wide range of interests and backgrounds.

slide-01.intent: Introduce the topic of Aalto University and set expectations for the presentation.
slide-01.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto University is a leading institution in Finland focused on educating future thought-leaders through interdisciplinary collaboration. without reducing readability.
slide-01.mustInclude: Aalto University is a leading institution in Finland focused on educating future thought-leaders through interdisciplinary collaboration.
slide-01.notes: Use general knowledge about Aalto University's reputation as an educational hub, referencing its focus on Lifewide Learning and Open University courses from source [2].
slide-01.title: Welcome to Aalto University: An Introduction
slide-01.value: Aalto University is a leading institution in Finland focused on educating future thought-leaders through interdisciplinary collaboration.

slide-02.intent: Explain the structure and educational offerings of Aalto University.
slide-02.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto University operates through six schools covering Arts, Engineering, Business, Chemical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Science, fostering creative sustainability and innovation. without reducing readability.
slide-02.mustInclude: Aalto University operates through six schools covering Arts, Engineering, Business, Chemical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Science, fostering creative sustainability and innovation.
slide-02.notes: Reference source [3] for the list of six schools and their focus areas. Mention the School of Arts, Design and Architecture, School of Engineering, etc., as described in the snippet.
slide-02.title: Structure and Schools: A Hub for Innovation
slide-02.value: Aalto University operates through six schools covering Arts, Engineering, Business, Chemical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Science, fostering creative sustainability and innovation.

slide-03.intent: Summarize key takeaways and encourage further engagement with Aalto University.
slide-03.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto University offers diverse opportunities for learning, research, and events that cater to a wide range of interests and backgrounds. without reducing readability.
slide-03.mustInclude: Aalto University offers diverse opportunities for learning, research, and events that cater to a wide range of interests and backgrounds.
slide-03.notes: Reference source [2] for Lifewide Learning and Open University details. Mention the availability of courses in Business, Technology, Languages, and Art and Design.
slide-03.title: Key Takeaways: Opportunities at Aalto
slide-03.value: Aalto University offers diverse opportunities for learning, research, and events that cater to a wide range of interests and backgrounds.
